lore.english:
An investigator of the Chinese Union PLA. She skipped grades several times and graduated Beidao University with top honors.

She inherited Taimanin's blood from her great-grandfather, who was orphaned after a war. To train her skills as a Taimanin, she had visited Japan several times and was educated by Asagi in Gosha. She admires Asagi, calling her "Master".

User of [FFFF00FF]"Beast Art"[-], a superhuman ninja art. Imbues the user with the power of a beast, and is also known as the "Beast Ninja". In Su's case, the power of a black dragon resides in her, which allows her to use physical abilities beyond those of humans. Also, she disperses an aura of Particles and makes blades out of her hand or wings on her back.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Fist[-]
skills.description:
Swings a powerful punch 3 times at the enemy, and [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases as [&DEF] increases.
On [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], grants a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:180102]%)[-] [&AllyProtection] to allies other than the character.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:180102] turn(s)
